reference.title: Configuration Files
reference.shortdesc: Review key repository and runtime configuration files that control CLI behavior, plugin loading, and schema validation.

strow.stentry: Python packaging metadata and console script registration for the core project.
Runtime dependency set for repository-based installation.
Built-in pattern data used by CorePlugin.
Discovery, planning, and execution contract schemas.

section.title: Plugin package configuration
section.p: Each plugin package must define an entry-point section in its own pyproject.toml:

ul.li: Keep schema and code changes versioned together.
Use dedicated build directories for generated artifacts.
